general.name: Slack Default Workspace
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>CFF0028D-9E41-4C4A-9426-B8DFE4017A77</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>CFF0028D-9E41-4C4A-9426-B8DFE4017A77</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Slack Default Workspace</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>966C86C5-90C5-412D-8E82-513F19325716</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>966C86C5-90C5-412D-8E82-513F19325716</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.tinyspeck.slackmacgap</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>DefaultSignInTeam</key><string>E02FV5V6L9M</string></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
